summary: Frontend testing for 10 UI feature requests (batch changes). All 10 test requirements verified and PASSED via Playwright + code review. Pages tested: homepage, /pakketten, /over-mij, /diensten/webdesign, /diensten, /voor/electriciens, /voor/fysiotherapeuten, /calculator.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: WhatsApp button has bg-gray-500 class (not green/black) - confirmed via code review + Playwright selector check
2. PASS: Contact section reactietijd shows 'binnen 8 uur' on homepage - confirmed via Playwright text search
3. PASS: PackagesPage (/pakketten) hero has white/light background with abstract image (BG_IMAGE + bg-white/70 overlay, not dark gradient) + logo img in nav - confirmed via screenshot
4. PASS: PackagesPage premium package shows 'Snellere reactietijd (binnen 8 uur)' - confirmed via Playwright text search
5a. PASS: OverMijPage hero has new slogan 'Geen bureau. Geen tussenlagen. Geen bullshit.' - confirmed via Playwright text + screenshot
5b. PASS (visual): OverMijPage 3-column stats '1 AANSPREEKPUNT, 0 VERRASSINGEN, ∞ DIRECTE LIJN' visible in screenshot - CSS uppercase transforms DOM lowercase to uppercase display
5c. PASS: 'Hallo!' removed from OverMijPage - confirmed not present in page text

6. PASS: Webdesign page (/diensten/webdesign) has full multi-section layout: hero (Webdesign die werkt), features grid (6 features), process steps (Van intake tot live), waarom webdesign (3 seconden), 'Meer diensten in ontwikkeling' section

7. PASS: Diensten page (/diensten) shows all 9 new niches: Schoonheidsspecialisten (col1), Masseurs (col1), Fysiotherapeuten (col2), Accountants (col2), Elektriciëns (col3), Schilders (col3), Timmerlieden (Meer Branches), Dierenartsen (Meer Branches), Klusbedrijven (Meer Branches)
8a. PASS: /voor/electriciens loads correctly - title 'Website voor Elektriciens | Yrvante', subtitle 'Gevonden worden bij elke klus', 6 benefit items
8b. PASS: /voor/fysiotherapeuten loads correctly - title 'Website voor Fysiotherapeuten | Yrvante', subtitle 'Patiënten vinden je makkelijker', 6 benefit items
9. PASS: Calendly 'Plan een gratis gesprek' button visible in contact section of homepage (data-testid='calendly-book-button'), subtitle '15 minuten kennismaking via Calendly'
10. PASS: Calculator page (/calculator) premium package shows 'Snellere reactietijd (binnen 8 uur)' as feature item
critical_code_review_comments: NOTE: OverMijPage stats text is lowercase in DOM ('aanspreekpunt', 'directe lijn') but rendered uppercase via CSS. Playwright inner_text() with CSS text-transform returns uppercase, causing false negative in text search. This is a test artifact only - visual confirmation confirms stats are correctly displayed.

NOTE: English version of CalculatorPage formSubtitle still says 'within 24 hours' (line 262) while Dutch says 'within 8 hours'. This may be intentional but E1 should verify if English version also needs to say '8 hours'.
NOTE: English CalculatorPage successMessage also says 'within 24 hours' (line 274). Again, check if this needs to be 8 hours for English too.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15: All 10 batch UI changes verified and passing. WhatsApp bg-gray-500, 'binnen 8 uur' on all pages (LandingPage contact, PackagesPage premium, CalculatorPage premium), PackagesPage white hero with abstract bg + logo in nav, OverMijPage new slogan + 3-column stats, Webdesign page full multi-section, Diensten page 9 new niches in 3-column + Meer Branches layout, new niche pages load correctly, Calendly button in contact section. Minor note: English calculator text still says 'within 24 hours' (not 8 hours) - potentially intentional.
